text: In modern coding agents, ordinary markdown files can change agent behavior.

evidence.quote: 现代 coding agent 里，一个很有意思的现象是：普通 markdown 文件可以改变 agent behavior。

text: Markdown files are only the visible part; the interesting part is the Harness's design of this mechanism.

evidence.quote: Markdown file 只是可见部分。真正有趣的是 Harness 对这种机制的设计：

issues.detail: quote spans a window `p007.s001`..`p009.s001` around the ref

text: 旧 notes 会和当前 instructions 竞争

evidence.quote: 旧 notes 会和当前 instructions 竞争

issues.detail: 1 argument(s) not found in the quote/span — advisory only

text: The model gets more text but the task gets less useful instruction when markdown is raw dumped.

evidence.quote: Model 得到了更多 text，但 task 得到的有用的 instruction 更少。

issues.detail: 1 argument(s) not found in the quote/span — advisory only

text: .md files should enter context through Harness routing, not be dumped directly into prompts.

evidence.quote: .md 应该通过 Harness route 进入 context，不能直接倒进 prompt。

issues.detail: 1 argument(s) not found in the quote/span — advisory only

text: AGENTS.md means: In this workspace, behave like this; it is workspace instruction context.

evidence.quote: AGENTS.md ：In this workspace, behave like this.

text: SKILL.md means: For this kind of task, use this procedure; it is task procedure context.

evidence.quote: SKILL.md ：For this kind of task, use this procedure.

text: AGENTS.md works because Harness treats it as workspace instruction context; it should be visible before the model starts operating on the repo.

evidence.quote: AGENTS.md 有效，是因为 Harness 把它当成 workspace instruction context。它是 project guidance，应该在 model 开始操作 repo 前可见。

issues.detail: quote spans a window `p026.s001`..`p028.s001` around the ref

text: The model remains responsible for writing and reasoning, but the Harness inserts stable project rules before each turn starts.

evidence.quote: Model 仍然负责 writing 和 reasoning。但 Harness 在 turn 开始前插入了稳定的 project rule。

issues.detail: quote spans a window `p032.s001`..`p034.s001` around the ref
1 argument(s) not found in the quote/span — advisory only

text: 它从 workspace 被发现

evidence.quote: 它从 workspace 被发现

issues.detail: 1 argument(s) not found in the quote/span — advisory only

text: The content of AGENTS.md should not be blindly copied into every visible transcript message; it belongs in the stable context layer.

evidence.quote: 文件内容不应该被盲目复制进每条 visible transcript message。它属于 stable context layer。

issues.detail: quote spans a window `p039.s003`..`p039.s005` around the ref
1 argument(s) not found in the quote/span — advisory only

text: AGENTS.md loads before model turn assembly, entering stable workspace instruction context alongside project rules and local operating constraints.

evidence.quote: AGENTS.md 在 model turn 组装前加载。它进入 stable workspace instruction context，和 project rules、local operating constraints 放在一起。

issues.detail: quote spans a window `p042.s001`..`p044.s001` around the ref

text: SKILL.md works differently: it boosts task performance by providing a focused procedure at the right moment.

evidence.quote: 它能提升某类 task 的表现，是因为它在正确时机给 model 一个聚焦的 procedure。

issues.detail: 1 argument(s) not found in the quote/span — advisory only

text: Without a skill, a model may understand general domain but miss local workflow.

evidence.quote: 没有 skill 时，model 可能懂一般领域，但会漏掉 local workflow。

issues.detail: 1 argument(s) not found in the quote/span — advisory only

text: With a skill, Harness can provide: when to use the workflow, which files/artifacts matter, which tools are allowed, what steps to follow, what checks prove completion, and what output format users expect.

evidence.quote: 什么时候使用这个 workflow

issues.detail: 1 argument(s) not found in the quote/span — advisory only

text: SKILL.md improves performance by converting fuzzy ability into repeatable procedure.

evidence.quote: 这个文件会提升 performance，因为它把 fuzzy ability 变成 repeatable procedure。

issues.detail: 1 argument(s) not found in the quote/span — advisory only

text: A good Harness uses progressive disclosure: scanning skill folders at startup or capability refresh, making only capability metadata visible to the model initially, with the full body entering context only when needed.

evidence.quote: 它使用 progressive disclosure。

text: SKILL.md first appears as capability metadata, loading the body only after task invoke; it enters task procedure context serving only the current workflow, not spreading into always-on workspace policy.

evidence.quote: SKILL.md 先以 capability metadata 出现，task invoke 之后才加载 body。它进入 task procedure context：steps、tool expectations、checks、output shape。

issues.detail: quote spans a window `p063.s001`..`p065.s001` around the ref

text: Markdown does not change model weights but changes harness-managed context, tools, and workflow for that task.

evidence.quote: 小小的 markdown，没有改变 model weights。却改变了该 task 里的 harness-managed context、tools 和 workflow。

issues.detail: quote spans a window `p065.s002`..`p067.s001` around the ref

text: At the right moment, loading different markdown files into context is what the Harness should do.

evidence.quote: 在恰当的时机，把不同的 markdown 文件加载进context，就是 harness 应该做的事情。

text: Harness 应该知道每条 rule 适用于哪个 directory。

evidence.quote: Harness 应该知道每条 rule 适用于哪个 directory。

text: .md 应该通过 Harness route 进入 context，不能直接倒进 prompt。

evidence.quote: .md 应该通过 Harness route 进入 context，不能直接倒进 prompt。
